query:
SELECT 
  transactionType,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(CAST(totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_chf,
  SUM(CAST(fees AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_fees
FROM transactions 
WHERE portfolioId = 90001
GROUP BY transactionType
ORDER BY transactionType;
